repair_history.diagnosis:
line 89: The variable 'heating_request' on the left side of equation is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool': heating_request is not declared as a variable in AGREE annex -> declare heating_request as a boolean variable using 'var' keyword
line 90: The variable 'cooling_request' on the left side of equation is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool': cooling_request is not declared as a variable in AGREE annex -> declare cooling_request as a boolean variable using 'var' keyword
missing EOF at 'var': AGREE syntax error due to incomplete var declaration -> Add semicolon after var declarations

missing EOF at 'var': AGREE syntax error due to incomplete statement or missing semicolon -> Add semicolon after 'var heating_request : bool;' and 'var cooling_request : bool;' to properly terminate the variable declarations

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 89: missing EOF at 'var': AGREE annex syntax error: 'var' keyword is not allowed in component type annex; only 'eq', 'assume', and 'guarantee' are permitted at top level in type-level annexes. -> Remove 'var heating_request : bool;' and 'var cooling_request : bool;' lines; inline the expressions directly in the guarantee clauses.

The variable 'heating_request' on the left side of equation is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool': heating_request is not declared as a boolean variable in AGREE -> declare heating_request as a boolean variable using 'var' keyword
The variable 'cooling_request' on the left side of equation is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool': cooling_request is not declared as a boolean variable in AGREE -> declare cooling_request as a boolean variable using 'var' keyword
mismatched input '=' expecting ':': AGREE equations require 'var' declaration before assignment -> replace '=' with ':' for variable declarations
